// How it works
Five steps.
Fully automated.

From raw imagery to completed inspection reports — our agentic pipeline runs end-to-end without human intervention at every step.

01
Image Ingestion

Drone, aerial, satellite or street-view. Any format. Custom mobile capture apps available for field teams.

02
Asset Detection

Proprietary AI locates poles, cross arms, transformers, insulators, towers and more. No training required.

03
Defect Classification

Multimodal analysis identifies defect type, severity and confidence score for every detected asset.

04
GIS Output

Results delivered as georeferenced layers into your existing GIS platform. GeoJSON, Shapefile, CSV or API.

05
Agentic Reporting

AI agents automatically complete inspection forms, compliance reports and maintenance logs.

// Traction
Proof before
promises.

We build before we pitch. Here is where we are today.

11+
Asset classes detected
Working pipeline with real utility infrastructure imagery. Poles, cross arms, transformers, insulators, lattice towers, distribution poles, earth wires and more detected in production conditions.
2
Live utility clients
Through our operating partner ELECTRAL — a post-revenue Turkish AI company with live paying utility clients and active ML requirements being scoped.
9
US pipeline organisations
13 named contacts across 9 US rural electric cooperatives and drone channel partners identified. Outreach initiated for paid pilot engagements.
MOU Signed

Formal partnership MOU executed with ELECTRAL Turkey for US market expansion. Delaware C-Corp incorporation in progress.

US extraordinary ability

// Agentic AI
Systems that act.
Not just respond.
🤖
Autonomous Research Agents
Proprietary agents continuously evaluate model performance in production and identify optimal retraining strategies — without human intervention.
📋
Agentic Inspection Reporting
AI agents read detection results and automatically complete inspection forms, compliance submissions, and maintenance logs. Hours of work in seconds.
🔄
Self-Improving Models
Research agent findings drive structured retraining cycles. Models improve automatically as your dataset grows — zero manual intervention required.
🛡
On-Premises First
All inference runs on your infrastructure. No data leaves your network. Built for regulated environments where data sovereignty is non-negotiable.
blitzai — agentic pipeline v1.0
$ blitzai.run --input batch_01/ --mode full → Loading imagery batch (100 images) → Asset detection engine: initialised → Defect classifier: ready → GIS formatter: ready $ Processing... → [████████████░░] 86% ✓ 94 assets detected across 3 classes ⚠ 12 defects classified · 3 critical ✓ GeoJSON layer exported → GIS platform $ blitzai.agents --complete-reports → Reading 94 detection results → Completing 12 inspection forms → Filing compliance report → Generating 3 maintenance work orders ✓ Done · 0 minutes of manual work
